titleStmt.title: SII 16.147: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 147. (A.R. No. 381 of 1904.) KALAMAḶḶA, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On two faces of a pillar lying outside the prākāra of the Chennakēśava temple.
The record is dated Śaka 1469 (current), Parābhava, Chaitra śu. 11, corresponding to 1546 A.D., March 13, (Saturday).

The inscription records a remission of tax on the barbers of Kalumaḷḷa in Pulivindalas11īma, given to Koṇḍōju, son of Maṅgaḷa Timmōju of Kandanavōlu by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Tirumalayyadēva-mahārāju of Yaṟaguḍi on the orders of Rāmarājayya in conformity with the royal remission of this tax all over the kingdom.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayā
bhyudaya śālivā
hana śakavarṣaṁbbulu
1469 Agunēṭi parābha
va saṁvatsara caitra śu 11
śrīmadrājādhirāja rā
japaramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa
kaṭārirāya sāḷuva śrī vī
ra sadāsivarāyadēvamahā
rāyalu vijayanagaramaṁdu
pṛthivisā(ṁ)mrājyaṁ sēyucu
ṁḍaṁgānu rāmarājayyavā
ri Ānatini śrīmanmahāma
ṁḍalēśvara yaṟaguḍi tiru
malayyadēvamahārāju
luṁgāru kaṁdanavōli maṁ
gaḷa tiṁmmōju koḍuku ko
ṁḍōjukunu maṁgalipa
(ṁ)nnu māni yiccina sarvamā
nya śāsanaṁ . rāma
rājayyavāru
rāyarāṇuvu
na maṁgalipaṁnnu sarva
mānyaṁ sēsi maṁni
ṁcina nimityamu
mākunu sadāsiva
dēvamahārāya
luṁgāru pāliṁ
cina puliviṁdala
sīmalōni kaluma
ḷlagrāmānamaṁ
gaḷa kāṇāci vā
ḍlu rāmōju
ṁnōjuṁgāru
dēsidāyaṁ kāniki
Asuvrayaṁ sahāgānu

tuṁgabhadrātīramaṁdu
śrīviṭhalēśvaruni saṁnidhi
ni śrī virūpākṣadēvara
saṁnnidhini trivācaka
mugānu sarvamānya
ṁ sēstimigāna mī pu
trapautrapāraṁpa
ryaṁgānu Āca
ṁdrārkasthāIgānu
Anubhaviṁcci batu
kamani vēIṁcina śi
lāśāsanaṁ . yī dha
rmānaku yavaru tappi
nānu tama tallidaṁḍṟla
vāraṇāsilōnu vadhiṁci
na pāpānaṁ bōvuvāru .
Digital edition of SII 16.147 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
